ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the job posting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job posting */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company name */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the job */,
  "skills" TEXT /* Required skills for the job */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary range for the job */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Experience required for the job */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education required for the job */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job (full-time, part-time, internship, etc.) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the job */,
  "job_source" TEXT /* Source of the job posting */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the job was posted */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits offered with the job */,
  "application_link" TEXT /* URL to the application form or external job posting */,
  "is_remote" INTEGER /* Indicates if the job is remote */,
  "visa_sponsorship" INTEGER /* Indicates if the employer sponsors visas */,
  "languages_required" TEXT /* Languages required for the job */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the salary */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the job posting has received */,
  "applications" INTEGER /* Number of applications received */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job posting (e.g., active, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_seekers" (
  "seeker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job seeker */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the job seeker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the job seeker */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the job seeker's account */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the job seeker */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the job seeker */,
  "skills" TEXT /* Skills of the job seeker */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Experience of the job seeker */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education of the job seeker */,
  "resume" TEXT /* Resume of the job seeker */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio or summary of the job seeker */,
  "linkedin_url" TEXT /* URL to the job seeker's LinkedIn profile */,
  "portfolio_url" TEXT /* URL to the job seeker's portfolio or personal website */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the job seeker (e.g., immediately, 1 month notice) */,
  "preferred_location" TEXT /* Preferred location of the job seeker */,
  "preferred_salary" REAL /*  Preferred salary of the job seeker */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /*  Preferred currency of the job seeker */,
  "is_remote" INTEGER /* Indicates if the job seeker is open to remote work */,
  "visa_status" TEXT /* Visa status of the job seeker (e.g., citizen, visa holder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seeker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employers" (
  "employer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the employer's account */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the employer */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the employer */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the employer's official website */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits offered by the company */,
  "languages_spoken" TEXT /* Languages spoken by the company */,
  "is_remote_friendly" INTEGER /* Indicates if the company is remote-friendly */,
  "visa_sponsorship" INTEGER /* Indicates if the company sponsors visas */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job application */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being applied for */,
  "seeker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job seeker making the application */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g. pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "cover_letter" TEXT /* Cover letter submitted with the application */,
  "application_source" TEXT /* Source of the application (e.g., job board, referral) */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date for the scheduled interview */,
  "interviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the interviewer */,
  "interviewer_email" TEXT /* Email of the interviewer */,
  "interviewer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the interviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_seeker_id FOREIGN KEY ("seeker_id") REFERENCES job_seekers ("seeker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job match */,
  "seeker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job seeker */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being matched */,
  "match_score" REAL /* Score indicating how well the job seeker matches the job requirements */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason why the job seeker is a good match for the job */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the match (e.g., algorithm, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_matches_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_matches_seeker_id FOREIGN KEY ("seeker_id") REFERENCES job_seekers ("seeker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job requiring the skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "proficiency_level" TEXT /* Proficiency level required for the skill (e.g., beginner, intermediate, expert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_skills_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seeker_skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "seeker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job seeker possessing the skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "proficiency_level" TEXT /* Proficiency level of the job seeker in the skill (e.g., beginner, intermediate, expert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seeker_skills_seeker_id FOREIGN KEY ("seeker_id") REFERENCES job_seekers ("seeker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job related to the industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_industries_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seeker_industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "seeker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job seeker interested in the industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason why the job seeker is interested in the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seeker_industries_seeker_id FOREIGN KEY ("seeker_id") REFERENCES job_seekers ("seeker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job related to the location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_locations_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seeker_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "seeker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job seeker interested in the location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seeker_locations_seeker_id FOREIGN KEY ("seeker_id") REFERENCES job_seekers ("seeker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_types" (
  "job_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job type */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job related to the job type */,
  "job_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the job type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the job type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_types_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seeker_job_types" (
  "job_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job type */,
  "seeker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job seeker preferring the job type */,
  "job_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the job type */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason why the job seeker prefers the job type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seeker_job_types_seeker_id FOREIGN KEY ("seeker_id") REFERENCES job_seekers ("seeker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the admin user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the admin user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the admin user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin user (e.g., super admin, moderator) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the admin user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)
